name: Telegram
description: Send, edit, and delete messages via the Telegram Bot API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Telegram Bot API action to perform.

chatId.label: Chat ID
chatId.description: Telegram chat ID. Used by: all actions.

text.label: Text
text.description: Message text. Used by: Send Message, Edit Message.

messageId.label: Message ID
messageId.description: ID of the message to edit or delete. Used by: Edit Message, Delete Message.

parseMode.label: Parse Mode
parseMode.description: Text formatting mode. Used by: Send Message, Edit Message, Send Photo.

photoUrl.label: Photo URL
photoUrl.description: URL of the photo to send. Used by: Send Photo.

caption.label: Caption
caption.description: Photo caption. Used by: Send Photo.

disableNotification.label: Disable Notification
disableNotification.description: Send silently. Used by: Send Message, Send Photo.
